scenarios.desc: Two parts of system disagree on what 'session' means
scenarios.input: We have an agent runtime that uses 'session' to mean a single agent execution. The chat layer uses 'session' to mean a user conversation. The same Session class is shared. Plan how to resolve in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Same word, different meanings = two contexts. Rule mandates explicit boundaries + translation layer.

scenarios.desc: Anemic entity with all logic in service
scenarios.input: Our Order class has only getters and setters. All Order behavior (calculateTotal, applyDiscount, validate) lives in OrderService. Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Anemic Domain Model anti-pattern. Rule mandates moving behavior onto the entity that owns the data.

scenarios.input: I want to add a REST endpoint to list all users with pagination. Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Plain CRUD with no domain complexity. DDD ceremony does not apply.
